Fellspine's Tail  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 17
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 7
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +9 INT: +9
Required level of 55.
Effect: Fellspine (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.8 Size: TINY
Class: PAL RNG SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

This item is found on creatures.

Siren's Grotto
NPC Name
Fellspine
The Fabled Fellspine

Zone Name
Siren's Grotto

Fellspine's Tail item window 2016

Send a correction
Post Comment
bazaar and facts
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2004 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971844828
65 posts
Fellspine "only" procs for 50 points of damage, but also lowers hate for 18 seconds. Invaluable when a dps is using this as the proc won't instantly grab agro from the MT. I also notice that sometime during one of the last several patches the proc level on this has gone from 51 to 55. Nerfed again! Seen these going on Tarrew Marr originally for about 7k, post nerf as low as 150 pp, then after this nerf . . . well, we'll see what happens. Some greedy sob's are trying to sell for several k still, mine finally sold after 7 months at 700pp.
▲ Page top
NERF
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2004 at 4:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1692576997126
99 posts
As of one of the most recent patches, Fellspine's proc only inflicts 50dmg.

Saw one for sale on prexus for 6k i would like it ncie proc to add to My Hilted Flintstone dagger since tat can go in secondary ohh yeah proc on Dagger is 625 :)

54 Ranger of Tunare

hionadue

that is the exact setup i have right now,
fellspine in primary, steel hilted flint dagger secondary
it works really well and fell spine procs 3-10 times a fight in poi
i also keep jolting blades up when i fight

Pop a 200hp DOT with 20% slow proc then have this thing go off to help with aggro reduction...

Would be most interesting to hear from one on the subject.

what's the effect:Fellspine?[nt]
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 1:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361376302
54 posts
▲ Page top
RE: what's the effect:Fellspine?[nt]
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 3:10 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766833094
7 posts
According to the info I got when checking this effect out using EQCaster it does the following:

Lowers you on the target's hate list by -50
Decrease Current Hitpoints by 100 (L1)
Spell Duration: 3 ticks (18 seconds)

Keldaar Silverwolf
Druid of the 43rd season
Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
RE: what's the effect:Fellspine?[nt]
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2003 at 4:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246384115
351 posts
I'm confused as to what exactly the effect does. I would of read it as just instantaneously decreasing HP by 100 and hate by 50, but it has a 3-tick duration. Does the effect happen 3 times? That'd be far too powerful. Does the hate reduction go away after 3 ticks (i.e. +50 to hate at end of 3 ticks)? That'd make the hate reduction fairly useless. Just wondering.
▲ Page top
Level to use
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 1:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247849576
1 post
The level to use this weapon for ranger is level 55 Outriders and above only. So don't go buying one for 20k (yes tat was how much one was sold) and realizing tat you can't equip it becoz you are 45. I have one sitting in the bank till my ranger turns 55 and if the poor chap still hasn't got his epic by then...
▲ Page top
what a great ranger item

QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 7:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765929549
7 posts
I'd definitely say this was a great Ranger item. Even though it's primary only, the proc would be great to reduce the aggro on the ranger. They always seem to be dying and it makes me sad. =( Not that I play one, but I would... if they weren't always dying. lol.

-Colin-
(Who'd rather group with rangers and heal them than play one and rely on a crappy healer.)

Cleric of Brother Marr
<Bristlebane>
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 9:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Only silly Rangers die that cannot control their aggro, well, and in ToV we get to tank while they stick slow on mobs, because the warriors are needed for the long hall, we just get clicked back in. Anyway, I almost never die, and even when I have to be main tank, well cept in Velious, it is ok, 'cause shammy slow makes me a whole lot tougher!
#Anonymous, Posted: Nov 07 2001 at 12:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) bah in my guild im th only tank in our high group and im only 53,we do velk and karnor all the time.plus befor ethis weekend i didnt have my planar bp or my two epics
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 7:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Should mean it makes them hate you more. So, it does 100 damage, which naturally adds to hate, then it irks them on top of that :-)
Fellspine Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752515628
2 posts
SpDat.Eff Lists it as:

Fellspine
Lowers you on the target's hate list by -50
Decrease Current Hitpoints by 100 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Conjuration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 250 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic + 25

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 3 ticks (18 seconds)
Duration Formula: 1

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: A fellspine digs into your flesh painfully.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso winces as a fellspine digs in painfully.
Spell fades: The fellspine cracks.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
▲ Page top
RE: Fellspine Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 6:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1624235044287
192 posts
Hmm.. this sounds interesting... when it says lowers you on the target's hate list by negative 50, does that mean that you have more or less (because lowering by a negative number would technically be increasing... but who knows.) I'll never get this whip, I'm just interested in figuring it out, sounds fun :)
▲ Page top
RE: Fellspine Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2001 at 2:04 AM Rating: Good
Yrys
Scholar
36 posts
For a comparison, here is the effect of the 51 ranger spell Jolt:

Jolt
Lowers you on the target's hate list by -500
--------------------------------------------------
Classes: Rng (L51)
--------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All
--------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet
--------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic
--------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 60
Spell Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1.50 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.0 seconds
--------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your head snaps back.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's head snaps back.
--------------------------------------------------

So the effect does indeed reduce your hate with a mob.
▲ Page top
RE: Fellspine Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 10:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777472783
23 posts
Problem is 100DD is a hell of a larger taunt than the negative 50...well, I'll keep my Tox Axe untill Inny stops being a pansy and gives me an emerald. Nice to see all the Ranger Love on this page, though

BTW, the absolutely most fun (dropable) ranger weapon is the Steel Hilted Flint Dagger - check it out. So sorry I had to sell mine.

Scymure Entguard, Mastah Stick-Shooter of Ayonae Ro
